J-14.name: Staged screening — full cost only on survivors
J-14.last_evidence_path: NEWLY PASSING iter-4. Code (auto_session.py:855-982): SCREEN enumerates seed_universe_configs on cheapest_model() with wfv_enabled=False (gated by full exceeded()), ranks by the ONE canonical RobustScorer.score(), PROMOTEs top-k=min(DEFAULT_PROMOTE_K=1,n_screened) on request model with wfv_enabled=True (gated by cost_exceeded() only), best via select_best(promoted) over PROMOTED ONLY. HERMETIC (16 staged tests): stage-routing execute_calls.wfv==[F,F,F,T] (test_open_universe_best_is_wfe_gated_not_highest_return:651), k=1<3, positive best-marking = WF-bearing promoted node with screened parentId (test_open_universe_explores_distinct_configs_and_marks_best:603-609), best≠highest-raw-return, stop-mid-screen/promote, degenerate-single, promote-fail-non-fatal. LIVE (real gpt-5.4-mini SCREEN + claude-haiku-4-5 PROMOTE): reports/qa/goal-financial_free-iter-4-evidence/J14-screen-promote-evidence.json + J14-final-session-snapshot.json — 3 SCREEN nodes modelUsed=gpt-5.4-mini wfStatus=None, 1 PROMOTE node modelUsed=claude-haiku-4-5 wfStatus=complete child of top-scored screened node, activity log carries SCREEN —/PROMOTE — entries, no secrets. (Live best=None is the correct WFE-gated outcome: the 2-month range yielded 0 WF windows → wfe 0.0; the POSITIVE promote→best path is proven hermetically + was proven LIVE iter-3.) Coherence COHERENCE-PASS (one RobustScorer, one BudgetTracker, additive blueprint, /health advisory only); Review PASS_WITH_NOTES; QA PASS. PIXEL not captured (FE down) — endpoint-layer + zero-FE-change code confirmation per documented throttle policy.

observations.note: PIXEL DEBT NOW 4 ITERATIONS UNRESOLVED — and this iteration's spec explicitly mandated clearing it ("services down is NOT an acceptable reason this time"), yet it recurred. The dedicated browser-qa-agent SKIPPED all 13 tests ("frontend not running") and QA's own managed frontend on :3692 went DOWN mid-window (FE 200 at start → 000 from poll 3, ss -ltnp shows NO LISTENER — genuinely down, NOT the Chrome-MCP hidden-tab throttle). J-08 (live token/USD/configs chips), J-10 (reload-mid-run survival), and the new J-14 (SCREEN/PROMOTE activity-log entries) were verified ONLY via the spec-sanctioned backend-endpoint substitute (GET /api/sessions/{id} → autoRun + activityLog + iterationHistory) plus zero-FE-change code confirmation of the existing auto-run render branch. ROOT CAUSE is the harness frontend lifecycle (the FE is not started / is torn down / crashes within the browser-qa+QA window), NOT agent effort — re-issuing the same instruction a 5th time will not fix it. Next iter must either fix browser-qa-phase.sh so the FE stays serving for the whole window (health-re-probed, uncontended tab), or formally accept endpoint-layer proof for these display-only journeys. The journeys are FUNCTIONALLY proven (live + hermetic + endpoint + code); the gap is purely pixel capture.
observations.evidence: reports/phase-goal-financial_free-iter-4-ui-test-results.md (Browser QA Verdict: SKIPPED 0/13 — frontend not running); reports/qa/goal-financial_free-iter-4-qa.md (§Step 4 health-check trail: FE :3692 200→000 from poll 3, no listener; backend 200 throughout); reports/qa/goal-financial_free-iter-4-evidence/{J08-live-counter-progression.json,J10-reload-refetch.json,J14-screen-promote-evidence.json,TC12-chrome-fe-unreachable.png}

observations.note: The iter-4 live open-universe QA used date range 2024-01-01→2024-03-01 (2 months) with the default walk-forward window config (6mo IS + 3mo OOS), so the PROMOTE node's walk-forward produced 0 windows (errors: 'Not enough data to form any IS+OOS windows') → wfe 0.0 → bestIterationId=None. This is a CORRECT gated outcome (and J-14's acceptance does not require a marked best), but it left the live promote→BEST-MARKING path VACUOUS — the spec's QA NOTE specifically wanted the best-marking path exercised live. The positive best-marking path is fully covered hermetically (test_open_universe_explores_distinct_configs_and_marks_best) and was proven LIVE in iter-3. LESSON: future LIVE QA of any walk-forward-dependent journey MUST use a date range long enough to form ≥1 IS+OOS window (≥ IS_months + OOS_months, i.e. ≥9mo at defaults), else the WF — and any best-marking that depends on it — is silently vacuous.
observations.evidence: reports/qa/goal-financial_free-iter-4-evidence/J14-final-session-snapshot.json (node 4de659e2 walkForwardResult: num_windows=0, wfe=0.0, errors=['Not enough data to form any IS+OOS windows with the given parameters']); reports/qa/goal-financial_free-iter-4-qa.md (§Step 3.5 TC-04)

observations.anti_goal: GET /api/sessions/{id} (the list/open path) MUST NOT eagerly parse full per-iteration result.json/rating.json payloads; iteration detail is lazy-loaded via the existing per-iteration endpoint.
observations.note: RESOLVED — verdict delivered by the iter-1 coherence-auditor and confirmed by the evaluator. get_session builds its iteration list from read_iteration_meta (lightweight) and lazy-loads heavy result/rating/equity/trades ONLY via GET /{session_id}/iterations/{iteration_id} (session_routes.py:144-184). iter-2/iter-3/iter-4 re-confirm CONFORMS: the staged open-universe path persists via the same lightweight write_iteration / lazy-detail. Do not re-litigate.
